messages.message: logo-instagrammedia-playHesure PilatesStudios often upgrade equipment after a few years of operation. Commercial reformers must stay stable through thousands of classes. Our reformers are designed for long-term studio performance.#BehindTheScenes #SupplyChainExcellence #OEM #PilatesReformer #pilatesfactory #SupplyChain #StudioGrowth 工作室通常在使用几年后会升级设备。商业改革者必须通过数千堂课保持稳定。我们的改革者专为长期工作室性能设计。#幕后 #供应链卓越 #OEM #普拉提改革器 #普拉提工厂 #供应链 #工作室成长instagram.com Which Pilates Reformer models do you offer? 你们提供哪些 Pilates Reformer 型号？

Hi , Thanks for reaching out. To help us recommend the right Pilates Reformer, could you please tell us: Are you buying for a studio, gym, or resale business? How many units are you planning to purchase? Which market/country will the machines be delivered to?

Hi, Thanks for asking. We offer a full range of commercial-grade Pilates equipment, including the following Reformer systems: •⁠ ⁠Standard Core Reformers – classic studio models •⁠ ⁠Wooden Reformers (maple / oak / beech options) •⁠ ⁠Aluminum Reformers – modern, low-maintenance •⁠ ⁠Foldable Reformers – space-saving, studio-capable •⁠ ⁠Reformer with Tower / 3-in-1 systems – Reformer + Tower (optional Cadillac functions) •⁠ ⁠Megaformer / Sculpt-style Reformers – long-frame, high-resistance models designed for strength & sculpt classes All models are designed for commercial studio use, with different configurations depending on space, training style, and intensity. If you’d like, I can share the full catalog or narrow it down to the most suitable models based on what you’re looking for.
Sure I’ll share the full catalogue with you.

Also, just to help you find the right model faster — are you planning this for a studio setup or resale? And do you prefer: 此外，为了帮助您更快找到合适的型号——您打算用于工作室设置还是转售？ 您更喜欢： Aluminum (modern, low maintenance) 铝（现代，低维护） or Wooden (more classic studio style) 或木制（更具经典工作室风格）
Once I know that, I can point you to the most suitable options in the catalogue so you don’t have to go through everything.
Looking for aluminium options for a studio set up

Perfect that helps a lot. For studio setup with aluminum reformers, I would suggest focusing on these two models: 1) AR011 – more premium studio look, very popular for new boutique studios 2) AR004 – more classic structure, stable and widely used If you're setting up a new studio, most clients go with AR011 because it gives a stronger visual identity and feels more high-end. I’ll send you the catalogue now — and I can also share real photos/videos of these two models so you can compare more easily.

Glad to hear that AR011 is a very popular choice for new studio setups because it has a modern look and works very well for commercial use. May I know how many units you’re planning for your studio? And which city it would be delivered to? Once I have that, I can help you with the next step.

Hi, just checking in AR011 is still one of the best aluminum models for a new studio setup — especially if you're looking for a clean, modern look. If you'd like, I can help you work out the next step for this model very easily. You can just send me your approximate quantity and postcode, and I’ll check the delivered estimate for you. Even an approximate number is totally fine.
Hi, sorry got caught up with a few things, We’re aiming for about 10-12 pieces, postcode will be Gurgaon, Haryana, India, 122001
